title: sphaerostigma spirale var. clypeatum
intro: Sphaerostigma spirale var. clypeatum, also known as the 'Fountain Bush' or 'Purple Fountain Plant', is a succulent shrub native to Western Australia. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Sphaerostigma spirale var. clypeatum include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant may include infusions or decoctions, often used in traditional medicine to create teas or remedies for various health concerns.
